title: TerraSMP
description: Modpack designed for the players of the TerraSMP
body:
# TerraSMP
This modpack is primarily designed for our server however you can play the pack easily without joining our server if you want to play on your own! Designed for adventure and fun multiplayer content, it is the perfect modpack to play with your friends on a series.

This modpack is majority vanilla+ with extra biomes, mobs, and items. With over a hundred mods there's a ton of content for you to explore and enjoy.

SMP Discord: https://discord.gg/q7gzfdAr5u

Requirements:
- 8GB Ram (6GB+ Dedicated to Minecraft)

Recommended:
- 16GB Ram (10GB+ Dedicated to Minecraft)
